description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by dense, mature trees and lush landscaping, creating a secluded and private atmosphere. The structure features a gable roof with two prominent roof sections and a central entrance, flanked by a driveway and a small front yard. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in stucco or painted siding, and the roof is a darker gray, possibly asphalt shingles. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, and the front entrance is accentuated by a small porch area with steps. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, providing balanced natural light. The overall setting suggests a suburban or neighborhood context, with the house nestled within a well-maintained garden.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, light exterior walls, and a central entrance, surrounded by dense trees and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and symmetrical windows, framed by large trees.
description_view_1: Side view mostly obscured by trees, with only the roof and some landscaping visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the bungalow partially visible through dense tree cover.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the side wall, part of the roof, and surrounding trees and shrubs.
